originContent: # FramePFX
translatedContent: # FramePFX

originContent: FramePFX is an open source, non-linear video editor, written in C# using Avalonia for the UI.
translatedContent: FramePFX 是一个开源的非线性视频编辑器，使用 C# 编写，UI 采用 Avalonia。

originContent: ## Remake
translatedContent: ## 重制版

originContent: I am currently working on a complete remake (in the remake branch). The main differences being a new audio engine, audio driven playback rather than by video, and TimeSpan based positioning rather than by frame.
translatedContent: 我目前正在进行一个完整的重制（在 remake 分支）。主要区别是新的音频引擎，基于音频驱动的播放而非视频，以及基于 TimeSpan 的定位而非帧。

originContent: # Docs
translatedContent: # 文档

originContent: ## Customisable GUI!
translatedContent: ## 可自定义的 GUI！

originContent: Themes can be customised to your linking. They can be saved to disk and modified in-app. The built-in
translatedContent: 主题可以根据你的喜好定制。它们可以保存到磁盘并在应用内修改。内置主题（暗色和亮色）不应修改，因为更改不会被保存。你应该创建一个副本并修改该副本

originContent: themes (Dark and Light) should not be modified because changes aren't saved. You should create a copy and modify that copy instead
translatedContent: ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX/master/FramePFX-DesktopUI_2024-12-29_08.30.49.png)

originContent: ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX/master/FramePFX-DesktopUI_2024-12-29_08.30.49.png)

translatedContent: # 构建

originContent: # Building
FramePFX assumes everything is 64 bit --- x86/32-bit/AnyCPU won't work properly!
translatedContent: FramePFX 假设所有内容都是 64 位 --- x86/32 位/AnyCPU 将无法正常工作！

originContent: The native projects are automatically downloaded and compiled when you first build the C# projects,
translatedContent: 本地项目会在你首次构建 C# 项目时自动下载并编译，

originContent: however, if you want media clips and exporting to work, FFmpeg needs to be downloaded separately.
translatedContent: 但是，如果你想使用媒体剪辑和导出功能，则需要单独下载 FFmpeg。

originContent: Here is the specific version that works currently (windows only):
translatedContent: 以下是当前可用的具体版本（仅限 Windows）：

originContent: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases/download/autobuild-2024-09-30-15-36/ffmpeg-N-117275-g04182b5549-win64-gpl-shared.zip
translatedContent: https://github.com/BtbN/FFmpeg-Builds/releases/download/autobuild-2024-09-30-15-36/ffmpeg-N-117275-g04182b5549-win64-gpl-shared.zip

originContent: ## Downloading
translatedContent: ## 下载

originContent: Clone the project recursively:
translatedContent: 递归克隆项目：

originContent: `git clone --recursive https://github.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX`
translatedContent: `git clone --recursive https://github.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX`

originContent: If you want to install FFmpeg to use video media clips and FFmpeg export:
translatedContent: 如果你想安装 FFmpeg 以使用视频媒体剪辑和 FFmpeg 导出：

originContent: - Create ffmpeg folder in solution: `cd FramePFX && mkdir ffmpeg`
translatedContent: - 在解决方案中创建 ffmpeg 文件夹：`cd FramePFX && mkdir ffmpeg`

originContent: - From the downloaded ffmpeg archive, copy the 4 dirs and the LICENCE.txt into that new ffmpeg folder
translatedContent: - 从下载的 ffmpeg 压缩包中，将 4 个目录和 LICENCE.txt 复制到新建的 ffmpeg 文件夹内

originContent: >There should be 8 DLL files in `\FramePFX\ffmpeg\bin`, and one of them should be avcodec-61.dll. If it's not 61 you have the wrong version of FFmpeg.
translatedContent: > `\FramePFX\ffmpeg\bin` 文件夹中应该有 8 个 DLL 文件，其中一个应为 avcodec-61.dll。如果不是 61，则说明你下载了错误版本的 FFmpeg。

originContent: You can delete the EXE files if you want, since they aren't used
translatedContent: 你可以删除 EXE 文件，因为它们并未被使用。

originContent: ## Build project
translatedContent: ## 构建项目

originContent: - Open FramePFX.sln. You will get an error about the `portaudio` project not being loaded; Ignore it, and build the solution by going to the `Build` menu and clicking `Build Solution`
translatedContent: - 打开 FramePFX.sln。你会看到关于 `portaudio` 项目未加载的错误；忽略它，然后通过点击 `构建` 菜单下的 `生成解决方案` 来构建整个解决方案。

originContent: Hopefully then you should be able to run and modify FramePFX projects without issue. This project uses Avalonia 11.2.2 and .NET 8 (C# 12).
translatedContent: 希望这样你就能运行并修改 FramePFX 项目而不会有问题。该项目使用 Avalonia 11.2.2 和 .NET 8（C# 12）。

originContent: >Don't modify the portaudio project because it's automatically generated by cmake, so your changes may be overwritten.
translatedContent: > 不要修改 portaudio 项目，因为它是由 cmake 自动生成的，你的更改可能会被覆盖。

originContent: ### Windows only commands
translatedContent: ### 仅限 Windows 的命令

originContent: The projects in the solution use windows commands like mkdir and xcopy, which may not work on other platforms.
translatedContent: 解决方案中的项目使用了 Windows 命令如 mkdir 和 xcopy，可能在其他平台无法使用。

originContent: Feel free to create a pull request on a more cross-platform solution!
translatedContent: 欢迎提交更跨平台解决方案的拉取请求！

originContent: ### Possible build problems
translatedContent: ### 可能的构建问题

originContent: Sometimes, the SkiaSharp nuget library doesn't copy the skia library files to the bin folder when you clone this repo and built. There are 2 fixes I found:
translatedContent: 有时，SkiaSharp nuget 库不会将 skia 库文件复制到 bin 文件夹中，当你克隆此仓库并构建时。以下是我找到的两种解决方法：

originContent: - Copy `\packages\SkiaSharp.2.88.7\runtimes\win-x64\native\libSkiaSharp.dll` into the editor's bin folder.
translatedContent: - 将 `\packages\SkiaSharp.2.88.7\runtimes\win-x64\native\libSkiaSharp.dll` 复制到编辑器的 bin 文件夹。

originContent: - Or, delete the `packages` folder in the solution dir, then right-click the solution in visual studio and click "Clean Solution", then click Restore Nuget Packages, then rebuild all.
translatedContent: - 或者，删除解决方案目录中的 `packages` 文件夹，然后在 Visual Studio 中右击解决方案，选择“清理解决方案”，接着点击“还原 Nuget 包”，然后重新构建所有项目。

originContent: If none of these work, try uninstalling SkiaSharp in the nuget manager and then reinstalling. If that still does not work, then I really don't know what's going on...
translatedContent: 如果以上都不行，尝试在 nuget 管理器中卸载 SkiaSharp 并重新安装。如果还是不行，那我真的不知道是什么问题了...

originContent: # Plugins!
translatedContent: # 插件！

originContent: FramePFX now supports plugins! The plugin API is very work in progress, but it can load plugins.
translatedContent: FramePFX 现在支持插件！插件 API 仍在大力开发中，但它已经可以加载插件。

originContent: Plugins currently must be compiled using the same dependency versions that FramePFX uses, since we don't use AssemblyLoadContext
translatedContent: 插件目前必须使用与 FramePFX 相同的依赖版本编译，因为我们不使用 AssemblyLoadContext。

originContent: You can find more info here: [Plugin system + FramePFX API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX/master/docs/Plugins.md)
translatedContent: 您可以在此处找到更多信息：[插件系统 + FramePFX API](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX/master/docs/Plugins.md)

originContent: ### Examples
translatedContent: ### 示例

originContent: The `AnotherTestPlugin` plugin adds a test configuration page (found in `File > Open Editor Settings`), and also adds a useless test exporter to the export dialog.
translatedContent: `AnotherTestPlugin` 插件添加了一个测试配置页面（位于 `文件 > 打开编辑器设置`），并且还在导出对话框中添加了一个无用的测试导出器。

originContent: Adding the page is very simple, and is doable from the plugin's `OnApplicationLoaded` handler:
translatedContent: 添加该页面非常简单，可以在插件的 `OnApplicationLoaded` 处理程序中完成：

originContent: ```cs
translatedContent: ```cs

originContent: public override async Task OnApplicationLoaded() {
translatedContent: public override async Task OnApplicationLoaded() {

originContent: ApplicationConfigurationManager.Instance.RootEntry.AddEntry(new ConfigurationEntry() {
translatedContent: ApplicationConfigurationManager.Instance.RootEntry.AddEntry(new ConfigurationEntry() {

originContent: DisplayName = "Test Plugin Settings",
translatedContent: DisplayName = "Test Plugin Settings",

originContent: Id = "config.testplugineditorsettings",
translatedContent: Id = "config.testplugineditorsettings",

originContent: // This page is just a PropertyEditor page.
translatedContent: // This page is just a PropertyEditor page.

originContent: // Completely custom xaml pages are a bit wonky at the moment,
translatedContent: // Completely custom xaml pages are a bit wonky at the moment,

originContent: // only user controls will work properly due to resource dictionaries
translatedContent: // only user controls will work properly due to resource dictionaries

originContent: Page = new TestPluginConfigurationPage()
translatedContent: Page = new TestPluginConfigurationPage()
这导致了：

originContent: This results in:
translatedContent: ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX/master/FramePFX-DesktopUI_2024-12-27_03.33.53.png)

originContent: ![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/AngryCarrot789/FramePFX/master/FramePFX-DesktopUI_2024-12-27_03.33.53.png)

translatedContent: # 待办事项

originContent: # TODO
translatedContent: ### Avalonia 重制：

originContent: ### Avalonia Remake:
translatedContent: - 实现可以拖放到剪辑/轨道中的效果列表的 UI

originContent: - Implement UI for Effects list that can be dropped into a clip/track
translatedContent: ### 渲染引擎

originContent: ### Rendering Engine
translatedContent: - 虽然我们可以访问 port-audio，但我认为整个渲染引擎需要彻底重构。

originContent: - While we have access to port-audio, I think the entire rendering engine needs an overhaul.
translatedContent: 以前，通过根据项目帧率从剪辑中提取精确字节数来渲染音频。

originContent: Previously, rendering audio by extracting an exact number of bytes from a clip based on the
translatedContent: 然而，这会导致大量爆音，因为播放的 FPS 并不精准。

originContent: project frame rate. However, this results in a lot of crackling since the playback FPS isn't pinpoint accurate

translatedContent: 视频渲染也需要重做，因为视口通常很小，但我们渲染的是每个剪辑的全尺寸视频帧，

originContent: Rendering video too needs to be redone, since the view port is typically quite small, but we are rendering full-sized video
translatedContent: 然后再缩小。这对于矩形和基本图形来说还好。

originContent: frames of each clip and then just scaling down. This isn't so bad for, say, rectangles and basic primitive shapes.
translatedContent: 然而，从 MP4 文件渲染 4K 视频帧是一个耗时且复杂的任务，然后缩小到 1080p（或剪辑的 MediaScale），

originContent: However, rendering a 4K video frame from an MP4 file is a long and nasty task, then scaling down to 1080p (or whatever the MediaScale of the clip is)
translatedContent: 最后再缩小到视口（通常约为 500x300 尺寸）是极其浪费的，所以我们需要 RenderFull 和

originContent: and then finally down to the viewport (typically around the 500x300 size) in the end is just hugely wasteful, so we need either RenderFull and
translatedContent: RenderPreview 方法，或者一个新的渲染系统。当前的异步渲染技术看起来还不错。

originContent: RenderPreview methods, or, a new rendering system. The current technique of async-rendering doesn't seem so bad.
translatedContent: ### 自动化引擎

originContent: ### Automation Engine
translatedContent: - 添加对平滑插值的支持（例如两个关键帧之间的曲线）。我尝试过做这件事，但难以弄清插值的数学，

originContent: - Add support for smooth interpolation (e.g. a curve between 2 key frames). I tried doing this, but had a hard time figuring out the math to do the interpolation, and also doing the hit testing for the UI
translatedContent: 同时在 UI 上做命中测试也有困难。

originContent: ### Clips
translatedContent: ### 剪辑

originContent: - AVMediaVideoClip is extremely slow for large resolution videos (e.g. 4K takes around 40ms to decode and render onscreen),
translatedContent: - AVMediaVideoClip 对于高分辨率视频非常慢（例如，4K 解码和渲染到屏幕大约需要 40 毫秒），

originContent: and only a few video codecs even seem to work. Lots of common file formats give an error like "found invalid
translatedContent: 而且只有少数视频编码格式似乎能正常工作。许多常见文件格式会出现“解码时发现无效数据”错误。

originContent: data while decoding". I don't know FFmpeg much but I hope to somehow fix this at some point
translatedContent: 我对 FFmpeg 了解不多，但希望将来能以某种方式解决这个问题。

originContent: - Implement fading between 2 clips
translatedContent: - 实现两个剪辑之间的淡入淡出

originContent: ### History system
translatedContent: ### 历史系统

originContent: - There's no undo functionality yet. I might try and implement this once I implement a few of the other features like audio and maybe hardware accelerated final-frame assembly in the renderer
translatedContent: - 目前还没有撤销功能。我可能会在实现其他一些功能（如音频和可能的硬件加速最终帧合成）后尝试实现它。

originContent: ### Bugs to fix
translatedContent: ### 需要修复的 Bug

originContent: - Importing certain video files can cause the render to fail (some sort of "found invalid data while decoding" error)
translatedContent: - 导入某些视频文件可能导致渲染失败（出现某种“解码时发现无效数据”错误）

originContent: ### Multi-thread synchronisation
translatedContent: ### 多线程同步

originContent: - We need to create locks to make accessing and modifying the application state safer, especially now that the activity system works.
translatedContent: - 我们需要创建锁以使访问和修改应用状态更安全，特别是在活动系统工作之后。

originContent: Maybe an application-wide lock for writing into the state of the models? This is similar to how IntelliJ IDEA works; a mostly-read, read-write lock.
translatedContent: 也许可以创建一个应用范围的锁，用于写入模型状态？这类似于 IntelliJ IDEA 的工作方式；一个主要是读的读写锁。

originContent: Write locks are only acquirable on the main thread (we use the dispatcher to get on there), but any thread can take the read lock. Taking the
translatedContent: 写锁只能在主线程上获取（我们使用调度器切换到主线程），但任何线程都可以获取读锁。获取读锁需要阻塞直到没有写操作，

originContent: read lock requires blocking until no write operations are left, and taking the write-lock requires blocking until all readers are done (and
translatedContent: 获取写锁需要阻塞直到所有读者完成（并且在尝试获取写锁时会触发一个事件，让读者取消操作以避免界面冻结）

originContent: there's also an event fired when trying to acquire the write lock, to let readers cancel their operations to avoid freezing the UI)

translatedContent: ## 贡献

originContent: ## Contributing
translatedContent: 欢迎热情贡献！只需创建一个拉取请求，或先创建问题然后拉取请求，随你喜欢。

originContent: Contributions are welcomed with open arms! Just create a pull request, or an issue then PR, whichever you fancy.
translatedContent: 你可以向上滚动查看如何编译和运行/调试该应用的信息。

originContent: You can find information on how to compile and run/debug the app if you scroll up a bit.
translatedContent: 待办事项列表在上面，你也可以直接在代码库中搜索 `// TODO:`。

originContent: The TODO list is above, but you can also just search `// TODO:` in the code base

translatedContent: 你可以在 docs 文件夹中找到详细说明，里面解释了编辑器的核心部分（例如

originContent: You can find detailed explanations in the docs folder, which explains the core parts of the editor (such as the
translatedContent: 命令、自动化等）。文档还不完善，因此并未涵盖所有内容

originContent: commands, automation, etc.). There's still lots to be documented so it doesn't explain everything

translatedContent: 代码库并不完美，欢迎大家帮助尝试规范化！

originContent: The code base isn't perfect so feel free to help try and standardize things!

translatedContent: # 许可

originContent: # Licence
translatedContent: FramePFX 中的所有源文件均遵循 GNU 通用公共许可证版本 3.0 或更高版本（GPL v3.0+）。

originContent: All source files in FramePFX are under the GNU General Public License version 3.0 or later (GPL v3.0+).
translatedContent: FramePFX 使用了一些带有其他许可证的库，如 MIT/LGPL 许可证。

originContent: FramePFX uses libraries that have other licences, such as MIT/LGPL licences.

translatedContent: 如果某个源文件缺少版权声明，则默认其许可证与 FramePFX 相同

originContent: If any source file is missing a copyright notice, it is assumed to be licenced under the same
licence as FramePFX
translatedContent: 当前使用的 LGPL 部分包括：
- FFmpeg.AutoGen，遵循 GNU 较宽松公共许可证版本 3.0（LGPL v3.0）

originContent: Currently, the used LGPL parts are:
translatedContent: - FFmpeg

originContent: - FFmpeg.AutoGen, which is licenced under the GNU Lesser General Public License version 3.0 (LGPL v3.0)
- FFmpeg
